Introducing the New Select Plan & Changes to the Live Program
Announcing Select Plan: 3-day evaluation with flexible funded options (Daily or 5-Day payouts, no DLL option), plus major Tradeify Elite upgrades - multi-account Live scaling, no sim-profit cap, 5-payout qualification for Growth/Lightning/Select.

March 31, 2026

Table of contents

Introducing the New Select Plan & Changes to the Live Program

Tradeify is excited to introduce the Select Plan, our newest evaluation track built for traders who want a slightly longer evaluation in exchange for a more attractive, less restricted funded account.

Alongside this launch, we are rolling out major upgrades to our Live Program, now rebranded under Tradeify Elite, giving traders more flexibility, more upside, and more opportunities to scale.

The Select Plan — Overview

With the Growth Plan, Tradeify allows traders to get funded in just 1 day.

With Lightning Funded, traders can get funded instantly, but that speed comes with consistency rules and tighter structure.

Now, with the Select Plan, we are offering traders a new option:

A 3-day evaluation that leads to a funded account with:

- Fewer restrictions

- Larger payout caps

- No consistency rules during funded mode (40% consistency applies during evaluation only)

It's the perfect middle ground for traders who don't want the strict structure of instant funding, but still want a cleaner, more flexible funded account once they pass.

Why We Added the Select Plan

The Select Plan was created for traders who want:

- A fair evaluation period

- A more open, less restricted funded account

- Flexible payout choices

- A clearer path into Elite Live trading

Many traders asked for a hybrid between fast evaluations and unrestricted funded accounts — and Select delivers exactly that.

Core Concept

Once a trader passes the Select evaluation, they choose their payout structure:

- Daily payouts with DLL, or

- 5-day payouts with higher caps and no DLL (a more professional-style funded account)

Key Benefits

- No consistency requirements in funded mode (40% consistency applies during evaluation only)

- Cleaner rules and more room to trade freely

- Path to Elite Live through consistent performance

- Carry through up to 5 funded accounts

- Choose the funded style that matches your strategy

- Traders who prefer more structure in evaluation are rewarded with fewer limitations afterward

The Select Plan was built to offer traders more freedom, more choice, and more upside.

Read the full description of the evaluation here:
​Select Evaluation Accounts

Read the full description of the payout rules here:
​Select Flex and Select Daily Payout Policies

Upgrades to Growth & Lightning Funded

Growth and Lightning Funded are being updated so all plans feed into the same new, scalable Live Program structure.

Old System

- Required 4 payouts

- Moved into one single live account

- Included a $100K simulated profit cap

New System

This is now replaced by a modernized, more flexible transition model under Tradeify Elite.

The New Live Program — Tradeify Elite

All funded plans — Select, Growth, and Lightning — now transition into Tradeify Elite, our upgraded multi-account Live tier.

What's New

No Sim-Profit Cap

Build unlimited simulated profits before going live.

Multiple Live Transitions

Move live more than once — no limit on transitions.

One Live Account Per Funded Account

Every funded account that receives a payout becomes eligible to transition to its own Elite Live account.

You can hold up to 5 live accounts simultaneously.

No DLL in Elite Live

Each Elite account has:

- No Daily Loss Limit

- Full upside potential

- Independent performance structure

Unified Structure Across All Plans

Whether you start with Select, Growth, or Lightning — the path to Elite is the same.

What This Means for Traders

Faster, cleaner progression to live

Meet the minimum payout thresholds and demonstrate consistent performance to qualify for Elite.

Real multi-account scalability

Each funded account becomes its own Elite Live account.

Higher earning potential

No DLL, no sim-profit cap, more flexibility.

Simpler, more transparent system

Clear, transparent thresholds and no limit on transitions.

Legacy Traders (Before December 3rd)

Any trader transitioning to live using accounts purchased before December 3rd may choose:

- The new Tradeify Elite Live Program, or

- The previous system (one live account + $100K sim cap)

Read more here:
​Tradeify Elite Program
